data.title: FTI Consulting appoints Jason Leow as Senior Managing Director in Singapore's Strategic Communications division. NYSE: FCN.
data.description: On December 3, 2025, FTI Consulting, Inc. revealed the naming of Jason Leow as a Senior Managing Director in the firm's Strategic Communications sector. This appointment signifies a significant move within the company's NYSE: FCN stock.

data.title: Argentina Lithium files technical report for Rincon West Lithium Project on TSX-V, FSE, and OTCQX. Dec 3, 2025.
data.description: Argentina Lithium & Energy Corp. has recently filed with the TSX Venture Exchange under the symbol LIT, Frankfurt Stock Exchange under FSE: OAY3, and OTCQX Venture Market under ticker LILIF, based in Vancouver, BC. The filing was announced on December 3, 2025.

data.title: ImmVira's MVR-T3011 shows promising results in BCG-unresponsive bladder cancer patients at SUO 2025 meeting.
data.description: In Suzhou, China, on December 3, 2025, ImmVira Group shared news about their poster presentation at the 26th Annual Meeting of the Society of Urologic Oncology (SUO 2025) held in Arizona, USA. The presentation highlighted the company's latest interim findings.

data.title: Meta Platforms, Inc. (Nasdaq: META) declares $0.525 per share quarterly dividend; payable on Dec. 23, 2025.
data.description: In Menlo Park, California on December 3, 2025, Meta Platforms, Inc. (Nasdaq: META) announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.525 per share for both Class A and Class B common stock. The dividend is set to be paid on December 23, 2025, to all stockholders.

data.title: POSCO Future M and Factorial sign MOU for all-solid-state battery technology development in US.
data.description: In Boston, POSCO Future M and Factorial have entered into a Memorandum of Understanding to collaborate on advancing all-solid-state battery technology.

data.title: Shift4 Payments prices €435 million Tack-On offering of 5.500% senior notes due 2033, expanding securities portfolio.
data.description: Shift4 Payments, Inc., a leading integrated payments and commerce technology company, based in Center Valley, Pennsylvania, recently revealed that its subsidiaries, Shift4 Payments, LLC and Shift4 Payments Finance Sub, Inc., have successfully priced a new offering. This offering consists of €435 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.500% senior notes due in 2033. The issuance of these "New Notes" will be carried out as supplemental securities under an existing Indenture dated May 16, 2025.

data.title: Kimco Realty receives 'A3' credit rating from Moody's, joining elite REITs with A-level ratings.
data.description: In Jericho, New York, on December 3, 2025, Kimco Realty ® (NYSE: KIM), a prominent real estate investment trust (REIT) known for its ownership and operation of high-quality, open-air, grocery-anchored shopping centers and mixed-use properties across the United States, revealed that the company has secured an ‘A3’ credit rating with a stable outlook from Moody’s Ratings (“Moody’s”). This achievement places Kimco in an elite category of REITs holding A-level ratings from the three major ratings agencies.

data.title: Mustang Energy Corp. stakes 2 new mineral properties in Newfoundland: Onyx Uranium Project & Bridal Veil Copper–Silver Project, totaling 446 claims & ~3,875 hectares. Expands exploration beyond Saskatchewan.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, as of December 3, 2025, Mustang Energy Corp. (CSE: MEC, OTC: MECPF, FRA: 92T) has announced the acquisition of two new mineral exploration properties in Newfoundland and Labrador. The properties include the Onyx Uranium Project in southern Newfoundland and the Bridal Veil Copper-Silver Project in central Newfoundland, totaling 446 claims over approximately 3,875 hectares in combined area. These acquisitions mark Mustang's entry into eastern Canada and serve as a strategic expansion of its exploration portfolio beyond Saskatchewan's Athabasca Basin.
